examples.exam_en: Blood was oozing from his wound.
Her voice oozed through the crack in the window.
She treated him with obvious contempt.
He felt deep contempt for dishonest people.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 불성실한 사람들에게 깊은 경멸을 느꼈다.

examples.exam_en: The aid was a great boon for the country.
examples.exam_ko: 그 원조는 그 나라에 큰 혜택이었다.

examples.exam_en: He squandered his last chance at success.
He was accused of squandering public funds.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 공공 자금을 낭비한 혐의로 기소되었다.

examples.exam_en: The passenger vessel departed from the harbor.
The trading vessel carried goods across the sea.
examples.exam_ko: 무역 선박이 바다를 건너 물건을 운반했다.

examples.exam_en: The loud neighbor was a constant nuisance.
The broken elevator was a real nuisance for residents.
He outran me in the marathon race.
Government spending will outrun the budget this year.
examples.exam_ko: 정부 지출이 올해 예산을 초과할 것이다.

examples.exam_en: It is difficult, nay, impossible to finish by tomorrow.
examples.exam_ko: 내일까지 끝내는 것은 어렵다, 아니 불가능하다.

examples.exam_en: He said nay to every request she made.
The evidence found at the scene could incriminate him.
examples.exam_ko: 현장에서 발견된 증거가 그를 유죄로 만들 수 있었다.

examples.exam_en: His testimony incriminated his closest friend.
examples.exam_ko: 그의 증언은 가장 친한 친구를 죄에 빠뜨렸다.

examples.exam_en: He impersonates all the well-known politicians.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 모든 유명한 정치가들을 흉내 낸다.

examples.exam_en: The canoe glided over the lake.
She glided into the room without making a sound.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 소리 없이 방 안으로 살며시 들어갔다.

examples.exam_en: It was sheer folly to speak without any notes.
examples.exam_ko: 메모도 없이 강연하는 것은 완전한 어리석음이었다.

examples.exam_en: Investing all his savings was the height of folly.
examples.exam_ko: 저축금을 전부 투자한 것은 더없는 어리석음이었다.

examples.exam_en: People gathered outside to watch the solar eclipse.
examples.exam_ko: 사람들이 일 식을 보려고 밖에 모였다.

examples.exam_en: The lunar eclipse was a breathtaking event last night.
The invaders defiled the holy place with blood.
He landed a cushy office job with short hours.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 근무 시간이 짧은 편한 사무직을 얻었다.

examples.exam_en: She is too cowardly to talk back to us.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 너무 겁이 많아 우리에게 말대꾸를 못한다.

examples.exam_en: She was a comely young woman with a warm smile.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 따뜻한 미소를 가진 매혹적인 젊은 여성이었다.

examples.exam_en: The constable patrolled the streets every night.
The captain ordered them to drop the anchor.
They raised the anchor and set sail at dawn.
The country signed the charter of the United Nations.
The Magna Carta was a landmark legal charter.
